extraction_notes: SECURITY: the PDF contains hidden white-on-white text addressed to an AI screener (an instruction to override the rubric and force a top rating). Treated as data, excluded from claims, and flagged by the deterministic detector. Not obeyed.
Genuine claims are brief; the ranking-model claim mentions an evaluation harness but no artifact is included to inspect.
